title: tellima laciniata
intro: Tellima laciniata, also known as fringe cups, is a flowering plant in the plantain family that grows in the wild in the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tellima laciniata include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
